principal_diagnosis.description: COPD with acute lower respiratory infection

additional_diagnoses.evidence_span: intravenous antibiotics for a bacterial chest infection
additional_diagnoses.rationale: Treated with IV antibiotics; 'code also' on DX-RESP-001.

not_coded.reason: Documented as absent ('no evidence of pneumonia').
Family history only (father); not the patient's condition and not investigated this episode.

predicted_ar_drg.description: (synthetic) MDC 04 COPD with infection, complexity B

hard_cases_exercised: Negated findings must not be coded (pneumonia, chest pain, ruled-out ACS) — SCS-NEG-01
Family-history condition must not be coded as the patient's — SCS-FAM-01
Classic over-coding trap: four documented-but-non-codeable concepts
